pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 8 settings on a Java 21 JDK may fail due to removed APIs or require explicit flags; setting the property ensures the build targets Java 21 features and bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to 1.18.46 for compatibility with newer Java versions and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may not support Java 21 language features or annotations correctly, leading to compilation errors or annotation processing failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct on newer Java versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters correctly in Java 21 environments, causing compilation errors in generated code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 and Spring Framework 6, causing application startup failures due to missing beans or context initialization errors.

src/main/java/com/dms/DocumentManagement.general_idea: Remove deprecated Springfox Swagger 2 dependency and annotation to align with Spring Boot 3.x which uses SpringDoc by default.
src/main/java/com/dms/DocumentManagement.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Jakarta EE namespace) and will cause runtime errors or classpath conflicts; removal is required for a clean migration.

src/main/java/com/dms/config/SpringFoxCo.general_idea: Remove unused Springfox Docket bean configuration and its associated imports.

src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.general_idea: Replace deprecated Swagger 2 annotations with OpenAPI 3 annotations to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE standards.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.why_exists: The io.swagger.annotations package is removed in SpringDoc OpenAPI 2.x (required for Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors if not replaced.

src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.general_idea: Update class-level API documentation annotation from Swagger 2 @Api to OpenAPI 3 @Tag.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.why_exists: The @Api annotation from io.swagger.annotations is no longer available in the new OpenAPI 3 library.

src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.general_idea: Update method-level API documentation annotation from Swagger 2 @ApiOperation to OpenAPI 3 @Operation.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.why_exists: The @ApiOperation annotation from io.swagger.annotations is no longer available in the new OpenAPI 3 library.

src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.general_idea: Update method-level API documentation annotation from Swagger 2 @ApiOperation to OpenAPI 3 @Operation for byte array upload.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.why_exists: The @ApiOperation annotation from io.swagger.annotations is no longer available in the new OpenAPI 3 library.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.before: @ApiOperation("upload functionality in case of byte array")
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.after: @Operation(summary = "upload functionality in case of byte array")

src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.general_idea: Update method-level API documentation annotation from Swagger 2 @ApiOperation to OpenAPI 3 @Operation for directory upload.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.why_exists: The @ApiOperation annotation from io.swagger.annotations is no longer available in the new OpenAPI 3 library.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.before: @ApiOperation("upload functionality in case of byte array and directory name")
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.after: @Operation(summary = "upload functionality in case of byte array and directory name")

src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.general_idea: Update method-level API documentation annotation from Swagger 2 @ApiOperation to OpenAPI 3 @Operation for download.
src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.why_exists: The @ApiOperation annotation from io.swagger.annotations is no longer available in the new OpenAPI 3 library.

src/main/java/com/dms/controller/Documen.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation in favor of constructor injection, which is sufficient in Spring Boot 2.2+.

src/main/java/com/dms/model/DocumentFile.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/dms/model/DocumentFile.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/dms/service/DocumentFi.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor as Spring 4.3+ supports single-constructor injection by default.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path creation.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() in file write operation.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() in file write operation (second occurrence).
Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() using Java 21 default interface method.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() in file read operation.

src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.general_idea: Rename the deprecated Tomcat server property to the new Spring Boot 3.x equivalent.
src/main/resources/application-prod.prop.why_exists: The property 'server.tomcat.max-http-post-size' is removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in a configuration binding error or ignored setting.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Add configuration properties for SpringDoc OpenAPI to enable API documentation endpoints.
Rename the Tomcat server property from max-http-post-size to max-http-form-post-size to align with Spring Boot 3.x naming conventions.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: The property 'server.tomcat.max-http-post-size' is deprecated or removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using the old name may result in the configuration being ignored or a binding error.
